<parameter=code>
# Check current green bar size
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 5:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"N: {n['pixels']} pixels, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print(f"\nLevel completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Gameplay changed: {last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
